examples: kṣipto hastāvalagnaḥ prasabham abhihato 'py ādadāno 'ṃśukāntaṃ gṛhṇan keśeṣvapāstaścaraṇanipatito nekṣitaḥ sambhrameṇa hasta+avalagnaḥ→hastāvalagnaḥ · āliṅgan yo 'vadhūtas tripurayuvatibhiḥ sāśrunetrotpalābhiḥ kāmīvārdrāparādhaḥ sa dahatu duritaṃ śāmbhavo vaḥ śarāgniḥ sa+aśru→sāśrunetrotpalābhiḥ · āliṅgan yo 'vadhūtas tripurayuvatibhiḥ sāśrunetrotpalābhiḥ kāmīvārdrāparādhaḥ sa dahatu duritaṃ śāmbhavo vaḥ śarāgniḥ śara+agniḥ→śarāgniḥ · ālolām alakāvalīṃ vilulitāṃ bibhraccalatkuṇḍalaṃ kiṃcin mṛṣṭaviśeṣakaṃ tanutaraiḥ khedāmbhasāṃ śīkaraiḥ kheda+ambhasām→khedāmbhasāṃ

tanvyā yat suratāntatāntanayanaṃ vaktraṃ rativyatyaye tattvāṃ pātu cirāya kiṃ hariharabrahmādibhirdaivataiḥ nayanam→suratāntatāntanayanaṃ +vaktraṃ · hṛdayanihitaṃ bhāvākūtaṃ vamadbhirivekṣaṇaiḥ kathaya sukṛtī ko 'yaṃ mugdhe tvayādya vilokyate bhāvākūtaṃ+vamadbhiḥ · datto'syāḥ praṇayastvayaiva bhavatā ceyaṃ ciraṃ lālitā daivād adya kila tvameva kṛtavān asyā navaṃ vipriyam navaṃ+vipriyam · parityaktaṃ sarvaṃ hasitapaṭhitaṃ pañjaraśukais tavāvasthā ceyaṃ visṛja kaṭhine mānamadhunā iyam→ceyaṃ +visṛja

alasavalitaiḥ premārdrārdrair muhurmukulīkṛtaiḥ kṣaṇam abhimukhair lajjālolair nimeṣaparāṅmukhaiḥ prema+ārdra→premārdrārdrair · iti dinaśataprāpyaṃ deśaṃ priyasya yiyāsato harati gamanaṃ bālālāpaiḥ sabāṣpagalajjalaiḥ bāla+ālāpaiḥ→bālālāpaiḥ · ekatrāsanasaṃsthitiḥ parihatā pratyudgamād dūratas tāmbūlānayanacchalena rabhasāśleṣo'pi saṃvighnitaḥ ekatra+āsana→ekatrāsanasaṃsthitiḥ · ekatrāsanasaṃsthitiḥ parihatā pratyudgamād dūratas tāmbūlānayanacchalena rabhasāśleṣo'pi saṃvighnitaḥ tāmbūla+ānayana→tāmbūlānayanacchalena

datto'syāḥ praṇayastvayaiva bhavatā ceyaṃ ciraṃ lālitā daivād adya kila tvameva kṛtavān asyā navaṃ vipriyam praṇayaḥ+tvayā→praṇayastvayaiva · parityaktaṃ sarvaṃ hasitapaṭhitaṃ pañjaraśukais tavāvasthā ceyaṃ visṛja kaṭhine mānamadhunā śukaiḥ→pañjaraśukais +te · nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ vāritās+tat · nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ nāryaḥ+tanvi→nāryastanvi

ālolām alakāvalīṃ vilulitāṃ bibhraccalatkuṇḍalaṃ kiṃcin mṛṣṭaviśeṣakaṃ tanutaraiḥ khedāmbhasāṃ śīkaraiḥ kuṇḍalam→bibhraccalatkuṇḍalaṃ +kiṃcin · yātāḥ kiṃ na milanti sundari punaścintā tvayā matkṛte no kāryā nitarāṃ kṛśāmi kathayatyevaṃ sabāṣpe mayi nitarāṃ+kṛśāmi · ajñānena parāṅmukhīṃ paribhavād āśliṣya māṃ duḥkhitāṃ kiṃ labdhaṃ caṭula tvayeha nayatā saubhāgyametāṃ daśām duḥkhitāṃ+kiṃ · paśyāmo mayi kiṃ prapadyata iti sthairyaṃ mayālambitaṃ kiṃ māmālapatītyayaṃ khalu śaṭhaḥ kopastayāpyāśritaḥ ālambitam→mayālambitaṃ +kiṃ

manyurduḥsaha eṣa yātyupaśamaṃ no sāntvavādaiḥ sphuṭaṃ he nistraṃśa vimuktakaṇṭhakaruṇaṃ tāvatsakhī roditu upaśamam→yātyupaśamaṃ +no · kāntaḥ keliruciryuvā sahṛdayastādṛkpatiḥ kātare kiṃ no barkarakarkaraiḥ priyaśatairākramya vikrīyate kiṃ+no · kopāt komalalolabāhulatikāpāśena baddhā dṛḍhaṃ nītvā keliniketanaṃ dayitayā sāyaṃ sakhīnāṃ puraḥ dṛḍhaṃ+nītvā · yātāḥ kiṃ na milanti sundari punaścintā tvayā matkṛte no kāryā nitarāṃ kṛśāmi kathayatyevaṃ sabāṣpe mayi kiṃ+na

nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ priyaṃ+mā · paśyāmo mayi kiṃ prapadyata iti sthairyaṃ mayālambitaṃ kiṃ māmālapatītyayaṃ khalu śaṭhaḥ kopastayāpyāśritaḥ sthairyaṃ+mayā · paśyāmo mayi kiṃ prapadyata iti sthairyaṃ mayālambitaṃ kiṃ māmālapatītyayaṃ khalu śaṭhaḥ kopastayāpyāśritaḥ kiṃ+mām · ityanyonyavilakṣadṛṣṭicature tasminnavasthāntare savyājaṃ hasitaṃ mayā dhṛtiharo bāṣpastu muktastayā hasitaṃ+mayā

ālolām alakāvalīṃ vilulitāṃ bibhraccalatkuṇḍalaṃ kiṃcin mṛṣṭaviśeṣakaṃ tanutaraiḥ khedāmbhasāṃ śīkaraiḥ viśeṣakam→mṛṣṭaviśeṣakaṃ +tanutaraiḥ · manyurduḥsaha eṣa yātyupaśamaṃ no sāntvavādaiḥ sphuṭaṃ he nistraṃśa vimuktakaṇṭhakaruṇaṃ tāvatsakhī roditu karuṇam→vimuktakaṇṭhakaruṇaṃ +tāvat · nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ ramaṇaṃ+tiṣṭhanti · nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ kim→tatkiṃ +tāmyasi

parityaktaṃ sarvaṃ hasitapaṭhitaṃ pañjaraśukais tavāvasthā ceyaṃ visṛja kaṭhine mānamadhunā parityaktaṃ+sarvaṃ · kopāt komalalolabāhulatikāpāśena baddhā dṛḍhaṃ nītvā keliniketanaṃ dayitayā sāyaṃ sakhīnāṃ puraḥ sāyaṃ+sakhīnāṃ · yātāḥ kiṃ na milanti sundari punaścintā tvayā matkṛte no kāryā nitarāṃ kṛśāmi kathayatyevaṃ sabāṣpe mayi evam→kathayatyevaṃ +sa · kāñcyā gāḍhatarāvaruddhavasanaprāntā kimarthaṃ punar mugdhākṣī svapitīti tatparijanaṃ svairaṃ priye pṛcchati parijanam→tatparijanaṃ +svairaṃ

dhīraṃ vāridharasya vāri kirataḥ śrutvā niśīthe dhvaniṃ dīrghocchvāsamudaśruṇā virahiṇīṃ bālāṃ ciraṃ dhyāyatā dīrgha+ucchvāsam→dīrghocchvāsamudaśruṇā · īṣadvakrimakaṃdharaḥ sapulakaḥ premollasanmānasām antarhāsalasatkapolaphalakāṃ dhūrto'parāṃ cumbati prema+ullasat→premollasanmānasām · vrajati ramaṇe niḥśvasyoccaiḥ stanasthitahastayā nayanasalilacchannā dṛṣṭiḥ sakhīṣu niveśitā niḥśvasya+uccais→niḥśvasyoccaiḥ · bhrūbhaṅge racite'pi dṛṣṭiradhikaṃ sotkaṇṭham udvīkṣate kārkaśyaṃ gamite'pi cetasi tanūromāñcamālambate sa+utkaṇṭham→sotkaṇṭham

hṛdayanihitaṃ bhāvākūtaṃ vamadbhirivekṣaṇaiḥ kathaya sukṛtī ko 'yaṃ mugdhe tvayādya vilokyate tvayā+adya→tvayādya · praharaviratau madhye vāhnastato'pi pare'thavā kimuta sakale jāte vāhṇi priya tvamihaiṣyasi vā+ahnaḥ→vāhnastato'pi · kiṃ mugdhe na mayā kṛtaṃ ramaṇadhīrmuktā tvayā gamyatāṃ dusthaṃ tiṣṭhasi yacca pathyamadhunā kartāsmi tacchroṣyasi kartā+asmi→kartāsmi · jñāte'līkanimīlane nayanayordhūrtasya romāñcato lajjāsīn mama tena sāpyapahṛtā tatkālayogyaiḥ kramaiḥ sā+api→sāpyapahṛtā

kopāt komalalolabāhulatikāpāśena baddhā dṛḍhaṃ nītvā keliniketanaṃ dayitayā sāyaṃ sakhīnāṃ puraḥ niketanam→keliniketanaṃ +dayitayā · iti dinaśataprāpyaṃ deśaṃ priyasya yiyāsato harati gamanaṃ bālālāpaiḥ sabāṣpagalajjalaiḥ prāpyam→dinaśataprāpyaṃ +deśaṃ · dhīraṃ vāridharasya vāri kirataḥ śrutvā niśīthe dhvaniṃ dīrghocchvāsamudaśruṇā virahiṇīṃ bālāṃ ciraṃ dhyāyatā dhvaniṃ+dīrgha · ajñānena parāṅmukhīṃ paribhavād āśliṣya māṃ duḥkhitāṃ kiṃ labdhaṃ caṭula tvayeha nayatā saubhāgyametāṃ daśām māṃ+duḥkhitāṃ

tanvyā yat suratāntatāntanayanaṃ vaktraṃ rativyatyaye tattvāṃ pātu cirāya kiṃ hariharabrahmādibhirdaivataiḥ vaktraṃ+rati · adhvanyena vimuktakaṇṭhamakhilāṃ rātriṃ tathā kranditaṃ grāmīṇairvrajato janasya vasatirgrāme niṣiddhā yathā akhilām→vimuktakaṇṭhamakhilāṃ +rātriṃ · kiṃ mugdhe na mayā kṛtaṃ ramaṇadhīrmuktā tvayā gamyatāṃ dusthaṃ tiṣṭhasi yacca pathyamadhunā kartāsmi tacchroṣyasi kṛtaṃ+ramaṇa · tatkiṃ rodiṣi gadgadena vacasā kasyāgrato rudyate nanvetan mama kā tavāsmi dayitā nāsmītyato rudyate kim→tatkiṃ +rodiṣi

datto'syāḥ praṇayastvayaiva bhavatā ceyaṃ ciraṃ lālitā daivād adya kila tvameva kṛtavān asyā navaṃ vipriyam iyam→ceyaṃ +ciraṃ · nāryastanvi haṭhāddharanti ramaṇaṃ tiṣṭhanti no vāritās tatkiṃ tāmyasi kiṃ ca rodiṣi mudhā tāsāṃ priyaṃ mā kṛthāḥ kiṃ+ca · dhīraṃ vāridharasya vāri kirataḥ śrutvā niśīthe dhvaniṃ dīrghocchvāsamudaśruṇā virahiṇīṃ bālāṃ ciraṃ dhyāyatā bālāṃ+ciraṃ · iti sarabhasaṃ dhvastapremṇi vyapetaghṛṇe jane punarapi hatavrīḍaṃ cetaḥ prayāti karomi kim hatavrīḍaṃ+cetaḥ

dampatyoḥ śanakairapāṅgavalanān miśrībhavaccakṣuṣor bhagno mānakaliḥ sahāsarabhasaṃ vyāsaktakaṇṭhagraham bhagno+mānakaliḥ · paśyāmo mayi kiṃ prapadyata iti sthairyaṃ mayālambitaṃ kiṃ māmālapatītyayaṃ khalu śaṭhaḥ kopastayāpyāśritaḥ paśyāmo+mayi · śītkārāñcitalocanā sarabhasaṃ yaiścumbitā māninī prāptaṃ tairamṛtaṃ mudhaiva mathito mūḍhaiḥ suraiḥ sāgaraḥ mathito+mūḍhaiḥ · prārabdhā purato yathā manasijasyājñā tathā vartituṃ premṇo maugdhyavibhūṣaṇasya sahajaḥ ko'pyeṣa kāntaḥ kramaḥ premṇo+maugdhya

ekasmiñśayane parāṅmukhatayā vītottaraṃ tāmyator anyonyasya hṛdi sthite'pyanunaye saṃrakṣatorgauravam tāmyator+anyonyasya · bhrūbhaṅge racite'pi dṛṣṭiradhikaṃ sotkaṇṭham udvīkṣate kārkaśyaṃ gamite'pi cetasi tanūromāñcamālambate dṛṣṭiḥ+adhikam→dṛṣṭiradhikaṃ · svacchairacchakapolamūlagalitaiḥ paryastanetrotpalā bālā kevalameva roditi luṭhallolālakairaśrubhiḥ svacchaiḥ+accha→svacchairacchakapolamūlagalitaiḥ · bhavatu viditaṃ chadmālāpairalaṃ priya gamyatāṃ tanurapi na te doṣo'smākaṃ vidhistu parāṅmukhaḥ tanuḥ+api→tanurapi

ityanyonyavilakṣadṛṣṭicature tasminnavasthāntare savyājaṃ hasitaṃ mayā dhṛtiharo bāṣpastu muktastayā iti+anyonya→ityanyonyavilakṣadṛṣṭicature · kānte katyapi vāsarāṇi gamaya tvaṃ mīlayitvā dṛśau svasti svasti nimīlayāmi nayane yāvan na śūnyā diśaḥ kati+api→katyapi · sākrāntā jaghanasthalena guruṇā gantuṃ na śaktā vayaṃ doṣairanyajanāśritairapaṭavo jātāḥ sma ityadbhutam iti+adbhutam→ityadbhutam · paṭālagne patyau namayati mukhaṃ jātavinayā haṭhāśleṣaṃ vāñchatyapaharati gātrāṇi nibhṛtam vāñchati+apaharati→vāñchatyapaharati

kṣipto hastāvalagnaḥ prasabham abhihato 'py ādadāno 'ṃśukāntaṃ gṛhṇan keśeṣvapāstaścaraṇanipatito nekṣitaḥ sambhrameṇa antam→'ṃśukāntaṃ +gṛhṇan · adhvanyena vimuktakaṇṭhamakhilāṃ rātriṃ tathā kranditaṃ grāmīṇairvrajato janasya vasatirgrāme niṣiddhā yathā kranditaṃ+grāmīṇaiḥ · bhrūbhaṅge racite'pi dṛṣṭiradhikaṃ sotkaṇṭham udvīkṣate kārkaśyaṃ gamite'pi cetasi tanūromāñcamālambate kārkaśyaṃ+gamite · prasthānaṃ valayaiḥ kṛtaṃ priyasakhairajasraṃ gataṃ dhṛtyā na kṣaṇamāsitaṃ vyavasitaṃ cittena gantuṃ puraḥ ajasram→priyasakhairajasraṃ +gataṃ

datto'syāḥ praṇayastvayaiva bhavatā ceyaṃ ciraṃ lālitā daivād adya kila tvameva kṛtavān asyā navaṃ vipriyam daivād+adya · ciravirahiṇor utkaṇṭhārtiślathīkṛtagātrayor navamiva jagaj jātaṃ bhūyaścirād abhinandatoḥ cirāt→bhūyaścirād +abhinandatoḥ · kimidamathavā satyaṃ mugdhe tvayā hi viniścitaṃ yad abhirucitaṃ tan me kṛtvā priye sukhamāsyatām yad+abhirucitaṃ · mānāndhakāramapi mānavatījanasya nūnaṃ bibheda yad asau prasasāda sadyaḥ yad+asau

kṣipto hastāvalagnaḥ prasabham abhihato 'py ādadāno 'ṃśukāntaṃ gṛhṇan keśeṣvapāstaścaraṇanipatito nekṣitaḥ sambhrameṇa nipatitaḥ→keśeṣvapāstaścaraṇanipatito +na · likhannāste bhūmiṃ bahiravanataḥ prāṇadayito nirāhārāḥ sakhyaḥ satataruditocchūnanayanāḥ prāṇadayito+nirāhārāḥ · śayyopāntaniviṣṭasasmitamukhīnetrotsavānandito niryātaḥ śanakairalīkavacanopanyāsam ālījanaḥ ānanditaḥ→śayyopāntaniviṣṭasasmitamukhīnetrotsavānandito +niryātaḥ · dīrghā vandanamālikā viracitā hṛṣṭyaiva nendīvaraiḥ puṣpāṇāṃ prakaraḥ smitena racito no kundajātyādibhiḥ racito+no

āliṅgan yo 'vadhūtas tripurayuvatibhiḥ sāśrunetrotpalābhiḥ kāmīvārdrāparādhaḥ sa dahatu duritaṃ śāmbhavo vaḥ śarāgniḥ duritaṃ+śāmbhavo · ālolām alakāvalīṃ vilulitāṃ bibhraccalatkuṇḍalaṃ kiṃcin mṛṣṭaviśeṣakaṃ tanutaraiḥ khedāmbhasāṃ śīkaraiḥ ambhasām→khedāmbhasāṃ +śīkaraiḥ · ete te kuṅkumāktastanakalaśabharāsphālanād ucchalantaḥ pītvā śītkārivaktraṃ śiśuharidṛśāṃ haimanā vānti vātāḥ vaktram→śītkārivaktraṃ +śiśu · gāḍhāśleṣaviśīrṇacandanarajaḥpuñjaprakarṣādiyaṃ śayyā samprati komalāṅgi paruṣetyāropya māṃ vakṣasi iyam→gāḍhāśleṣaviśīrṇacandanarajaḥpuñjaprakarṣādiyaṃ +śayyā

āliṅgan yo 'vadhūtas tripurayuvatibhiḥ sāśrunetrotpalābhiḥ kāmīvārdrāparādhaḥ sa dahatu duritaṃ śāmbhavo vaḥ śarāgniḥ śāmbhavo+vaḥ · āyātā vayamāgamiṣyati suhṛdvargasya bhāgyodayaiḥ saṃdeśo vada kastavābhilaṣitastīrtheṣu toyāñjaliḥ saṃdeśo+vada · purastanvyā gotraskhalanacakito'haṃ natamukhaḥ pravṛtto vailakṣyātkimapi likhituṃ daivahatakaḥ pravṛtto+vailakṣyāt · rāmāṇāṃ ramaṇīyavaktraśaśinaḥ svedodabindupluto vyālolālakavallarīṃ pracalayan dhunvan nitambāmbaram plutaḥ→svedodabindupluto +vyālola

bhūyo'pyevamiti skhalan mṛdugirā saṃsūcya duśceṣṭitaṃ dhanyo hanyata eva nihnutiparaḥ preyān rudatyā hasan duśceṣṭitaṃ+dhanyo · dhīraṃ vāridharasya vāri kirataḥ śrutvā niśīthe dhvaniṃ dīrghocchvāsamudaśruṇā virahiṇīṃ bālāṃ ciraṃ dhyāyatā ciraṃ+dhyāyatā · iti sarabhasaṃ dhvastapremṇi vyapetaghṛṇe jane punarapi hatavrīḍaṃ cetaḥ prayāti karomi kim sarabhasaṃ+dhvasta · īṣadvakrimakaṃdharaḥ sapulakaḥ premollasanmānasām antarhāsalasatkapolaphalakāṃ dhūrto'parāṃ cumbati phalakām→antarhāsalasatkapolaphalakāṃ +dhūrtaḥ
